rows.label: qev075201_MSG0001
rows.name:
You're the strong warrior from before!
Hehe! I had a feeling we'd meet somewhere,
but to actually run into you like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0002
rows.name: Now then... Shall we have a match!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075201_SEL0011
rows.name: Adopt a battle stance, showing you accept the challenge.

rows.label: qev075201_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev075201_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline, stating that fighting in the city is prohibited.

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ready to go so suddenly!?
Hahaha! You're the best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0004
rows.name:
...But you know, the last time I fought in the city,
the Earthlings got really mad at me,
talking about public order and rules![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0005
rows.name:
So... how about we have our match
in the Nightglow Forest?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0006
rows.name:
...That's right, the last time I fought in the city,
the Earthlings got really mad at me,
talking about public order and rules.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0007
rows.name:
Man, thanks for stopping me!
I had completely forgotten.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hmm... Right then. How about we have our match
in the Nightglow Forest?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Over there, I can perfectly demonstrate
the Hundred Hellions' guerrilla tactics![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Hehe! It won't go like last time!
So, what do you say! Will you do it!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0011
rows.name:
I knew you'd accept.
...It's a strange thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Even though we've only fought once,
I feel like you're a comrade-in-arms
whom I've shared the battlefield with many times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075201_SEL0031
rows.name: Empathize with what Zang is saying.

rows.label: qev075201_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev075201_SEL0041
rows.name: State that you don't particularly feel that way.

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0013
rows.name:
My master often used to say that if I wanted to grow strong,
I should make a rival who is both an unrivaled best friend
and my greatest enemy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0014
rows.name:
...He must have been talking about
someone exactly like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0015
rows.name:
Are you saying you won't show openings to an upcoming opponent?
I'm not very good at that sort of thing,
but my master did tell me to close my heart before an enemy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0016
rows.name: Just as I thought, it seems I have a lot to learn from you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Well then, I'll head to the forest first!
When you're ready, come to the single-log bridge in the Nightglow Forest—
around the Elephant's Trunk![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Not bad!
You actually found me blended into the forest![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Well, if surprise attacks don't work,
I'll just have to clash with you head-on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Tch! You found me here too!
You're a tough one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0021
rows.name:
You really... keep things entertaining!
Let's keep going at it, more and more![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0022
rows.name:
I've fully realized that cheap tricks
won't work on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0023
rows.name:
From here on out, it's not guerrilla warfare.
It's a duel between noble warriors![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0024
rows.name:
Here I go! My name is Gi Zang,
the last survivor of the Hundred Hellions!
Now, I draw the sword entrusted to me by my ma[ST:wide ] Ouch![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_JNK0050
rows.name: Advise

rows.label: qev075201_SEL0051
rows.name: Point out that he bit his tongue and urge him to try again.

rows.label: qev075201_JNK0060
rows.name: Silence

rows.label: qev075201_SEL0061
rows.name: Start the fight as if nothing happened.

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Agh! I won't just take this lying down!
My name is the last survivor of the Hundred He[ST:wide ]
...Ouch![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0026
rows.name: ...Ow, ow, ow, ow...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0027
rows.name:
Tch, Grandpa told me warriors should state their names
when fighting a duel, so I practiced this a lot, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0028
rows.name:
I'm just no good at saying difficult things!
Anyway, let's have a proper match![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0029
rows.name: ...Ow, ow, ow, ow...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Tch, Grandpa told me warriors should state their names
when fighting a duel, so I practiced this a lot, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0031
rows.name:
Well... It helps that you didn't bring it up much!
Anyway, let's have a proper match![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0032
rows.name:
Ow, ow, ow... This is my loss.
You've gotten even stronger since
the first time we met, haven't you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0033
rows.name:
Compared to that, I'm still nowhere near enough.
Grandpa would scold me at this rate.
I have to get much, much stronger...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_JNK0070
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev075201_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask for details about Zang's grandfather.

rows.label: qev075201_JNK0080
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev075201_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask the reason why Zang tries to become strong.

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0034
rows.name:
He was a hero of the Hundred Hellions who never took a single step back
even when fighting alone against hundreds of Growth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0035
rows.name:
He took me in when I was a war orphan
and raised me as his successor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0036
rows.name:
...He was an incredibly strict grandpa.
If I slacked off on my training even a little,
he'd suddenly kick me into a waterfall basin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0037
rows.name:
But, on the days I trained hard,
he would make warm Itara Mushroom Stew
and tell me tales of his past heroics.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0038
rows.name:
Makes me remember it.
It was delicious... that stew...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0039
rows.name: Well... I can't drink it anymore, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_JNK0090
rows.name: Query[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask for details on why he can't drink his grandfather's stew.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_JNK0100
rows.name: Change Topic[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_SEL0101
rows.name: Consider Gi Zang's sadness and change the topic by asking what his hometown was like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0040
rows.name:
...My comrades from the Hundred Hellions
are no longer in this world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0041
rows.name:
Our power exists solely for our homeland...
Following that conviction, even after the Lars surrendered,
they resisted the Growth to the bitter end...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0042
rows.name:
Our forest was burned, our homes were burned, our families were burned...
Everyone was killed, leaving only me behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0043
rows.name:
...At that time, Grandpa's entire body was pierced by gunfire and he died.
Leaving me with his last words to save the Lars with this sword.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0044
rows.name:
But... I... couldn't die.
Stopped by Ga-Derg-sama, I survived...
And ended up doing exactly what the Growth ordered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0045
rows.name:
...I've had enough of that humiliation.
This time for sure, I will absolutely avenge my comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0046
rows.name:
I will become strong.
I'll acquire strength so that no one can trample on me,
and I will properly live on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0047
rows.name:
Hehe! To completely slaughter the bastards
who killed the Hundred Hellions![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0048
rows.name:
...Even after the Lars surrendered, everyone in the hidden village
resisted the Growth to the bitter end...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0049
rows.name:
Our forest was burned, our homes were burned, our families were burned...
Everyone was killed, leaving only me behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0050
rows.name:
Grandpa's entire body was pierced by gunfire and he died too,
leaving his last words to save the country with this sword.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0051
rows.name:
But, pathetically, I couldn't die.
Stopped by Ga-Derg-sama, I survived...
And ended up doing exactly what the Growth ordered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0052
rows.name:
...I've had enough of that humiliation.
This time for sure, I will absolutely avenge my comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0053
rows.name:
I will become strong.
I'll acquire strength so that no one can trample on me,
and I will properly live on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0054
rows.name:
...Alright!
Anyway, please fight me again!
Here, this is a token of gratitude for joining me in the forest![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0055
rows.name:
Also, thanks for listening to me talk about various things.
How should I say it, it made me happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075201_MSG0056
rows.name: Hehe... Well, see you later![ST:wait ]
